title: a lot of mods
description: very optimized modpack with the right amount of mods
body: very optimized modpack with just the right amount of mods. The mods in this modpack will improve gameplay in terms of optimization, beauty, convenience, bug fixes and bugs, add the best mod translations into Russian, and add many features to improve QoL (quality of life). The advantage of this modpack over others is that there are a lot of great mods, as well as many unpopular but effective, for example, after adding little-known optimization mods my PC began to load less, but this applies to all mods, not just optimization. If you haven't found a ready-made modpack that would suit you, you need to play with my modpack
